description: Production cost envelope guardrails for winner configuration

rationale.max_commission: Cost stress test shows 2x baseline (5.0 USD) is max viable
rationale.max_spread: Spread >0.5 pips causes performance degradation (91% return at 2x, margin calls at higher)
rationale.breach_policy: NO_TRADE prevents entering positions under unfavorable costs; FLATTEN closes existing if breached
